title: Week 2 Payment: $625 + Ad Spend Allocation (1/2 of the monthly ad sp
content:
Week 2 Payment: $625 + Ad Spend Allocation (1/2 of the monthly ad spend, $2,000, to cater for the commencement of advertising campaigns).
Week 3 Payment: $625 (covers ongoing service activities, including content management, SEO optimization, and ad monitoring).
Week 4 Payment: $625 + Ad Spend Allocation (1/2 of the monthly ad spend, $2,000, to cover the closing activities of the month and prepare for the next month's campaigns).

This schedule ensures that the service provider's fees are distributed evenly across the month, with ad spend allocations timed to optimize campaign launches and adjustments.

10. Acceptance Criteria


The acceptance criteria will be defined based on the service deliverables, client satisfaction within the revision cycles policy, and adaptability to work within the Client's SMART (Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, Time-bound) goals. This ensures a flexible and results-oriented approach to achieving the client’s marketing objectives.

11. Contract Length and Renewal
